# Greeni
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Greeni&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Greeni
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = rare
| desc = This is a acidi... A galactic blaster made up from the greenest of green.

| rof = 120
| range = 6.51
| projSpeed = 18.5
| lifetime = 350
| minDmg = 115
| maxDmg = 140
| shots = 2
| feedp = 3000

| lootbag = white bag
|dropsFrom = zucc}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]

</noinclude>
